title: Support for other registries
body: Is there a plan to introduce support for other registries like Nvidia NGC, GHCR?

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

What kind of functionality are you looking for, exactly? (And did you mean GHCR?)

From a quick check, reading `docker://nvcr.io/nvidia/tensorflow` seems to work fine for me.

I am looking at pulling images from different container registries and save them for faster usage. E.g. GHCR, NGC, etc
I tried out only the docker hub hosted image and didn't try NGC ones as it wasn't clear from documentation. I will give it a try now. Thanks for checking on that.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I’m assuming using other registries works, please reopen with a specific reproducer if that’s not the case.
